zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：弱势震荡延续下行
zh.content:
短期趋势维持偏空震荡结构，价格运行于6.18附近，跌破20日均线6.42后持续承压，反弹力度有限，市场动能偏弱，延续下行压力。

MACD持续位于零轴下方并维持负值动能，信号线缺失但柱体扩张有限，说明下行动能仍在但未加速，属于弱势惯性阶段，延续观察为主。

下方关键支撑集中在6.12-6.10区域，日内低点6.1262已多次测试；上方阻力6.30与6.42（20日均线）形成双重压制，突破前偏弱。

操作建议以反弹高空为主，若价格反抽至6.30附近可分批布局空单，止损放在6.42上方；若跌破6.10则可能加速下探6.00整数关口。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD continues to trade under clear short-term bearish pressure after slipping below its 20-period simple moving average at 6.4229. Price action remains compressed between 6.12 and 6.30, showing weak upside follow-through and persistent selling pressure on rebounds. The inability to reclaim the SMA suggests sellers are still in control, while intraday structure leans toward lower highs and fading momentum across recent sessions, with no clear reversal signal yet.

Momentum indicators reinforce a bearish bias as MACD remains in negative territory at -0.1201, reflecting sustained downside momentum. With no signal line provided, confirmation of recovery remains limited. The absence of RSI data reduces precision, but price behavior suggests neither strong oversold reversal nor bullish divergence. Overall momentum structure favors continuation of consolidation-to-downside drift unless buying volume increases meaningfully in the near term.

Immediate support is located near the recent low at 6.1262, with a psychological level at 6.00 acting as the next downside cushion if selling pressure accelerates. On the upside, resistance sits first at 6.30, followed by the 20-SMA around 6.42, which now acts as a key dynamic barrier. A stronger breakout would require acceptance above 6.50 to shift short-term sentiment.

Short-term trading conditions favor a cautious approach, with rallies toward resistance zones offering potential short entries while momentum remains weak. Conservative traders may wait for a confirmed reclaim of the 20-SMA before considering long positions, as current structure does not yet support sustained upside continuation. Risk management is essential, with stops placed above 6.50 for shorts or below 6.10 for breakdown trades.
